pi_items.source: Task instructions and public map data for Tromsø, Norway.
Task instructions and public map data for Tromsø, Norway.
Task instructions requiring an altitude parameter of 20.
Task instructions explicitly requesting SUOMI NPP (37849), NOAA 19 (33591), and METOP-B (38771), which correspond to these NORAD IDs via public TLE databases.
Task instructions specifying the global module update cycle to 100 milliseconds.
Task instructions specifying the new tracking module name.

privileged_info_summary: Verified that the requested ground station coordinates (69.6492, 18.9553) correctly map to Tromsø, Norway. Verified that the requested NORAD IDs (37849, 33591, 38771) match the targeted satellites SUOMI NPP, NOAA 19, and METOP-B via public TLE records. Crucially discovered that the task is entirely defective because 'verifier.py' is missing from the environment, rendering the task unscorable despite success mode 'program' explicitly pointing to 'verifier.py::verify_high_speed_telemetry'.
